## What Changed

<!-- Describe what this PR adds, changes, or fixes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] All price data includes source provenance: seller or publisher, date, URL or reference
- [ ] No fabricated, estimated, or inferred prices are submitted as observations
- [ ] No credentials, private contact details, or real `.env` values are committed
- [ ] Data files follow the existing YAML or JSON schema
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive

## Community Intake PRs

For PRs opened by `.github/workflows/community-intake.yml`:

- [ ] The source issue carries the `approved` label
- [ ] The diff matches the issue body
- [ ] The cited seller or URL still looks legitimate
- [ ] Generated artifacts were refreshed
- [ ] The PR body lists the validation steps

## Type of Change

- [ ] Price data update
- [ ] Data correction
- [ ] New article or market note
- [ ] Code or pipeline change
- [ ] Documentation
